name: infras-ai-skills
description: Infrastructure, IaC, and CI/CD skills for Codex and Claude Code.

interface.shortDescription: Infrastructure and CI/CD skill pack for high-quality platform workflows.
interface.longDescription: Reusable infrastructure, IaC, and CI/CD skills that apply practical experience and industry best practices to authoring, review, validation, and delivery automation.
defaultPrompt: Use terraform to scaffold a reusable module.
Review this Terraform directory for risky issues.
Use helm to scaffold or review a Kubernetes chart with safer defaults.
Use terragrunt to design a multi-environment layout.
Use github-actions to review this CI workflow for permission and fork-safety issues.
Use github to standardize repository ownership and delivery guidance.
Use these skills to apply high-quality infrastructure best practices across this repo.
